full_text:
Ji Mu (Siran) 吉穆 (思然)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ji Mu (吉穆), styledSiran (思然). Son of Ji Ping. Fled the capital but returned secretly. Died in Geng Ji’s coup. Ji Mu was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Han Dynasty. Ji Mu lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
